% falta achar citações adequadas para esses recursos aqui

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kCc8FmEb1nY

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GU2K0kiHE1Q	

https://github.com/Jason2Brownlee/awesome-llm-books/blob/main/books/natural-language-processing-with-transformers.md

https://github.com/Jason2Brownlee/awesome-llm-books/blob/main/books/large-language-models.md

https://github.com/Jason2Brownlee/awesome-llm-books/blob/main/books/build-a-large-language-model.md

https://aws.amazon.com/what-is/autoregressive-models/

https://huggingface.co/learn/nlp-course/chapter1/6?fw=pt

https://magazine.sebastianraschka.com/p/understanding-encoder-and-decoder

https://transformer-circuits.pub/2021/framework/index.html 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wjZofJX0v4M 

https://jalammar.github.io/illustrated-transformer/

https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/how-transformer-llms-work/

https://jalammar.github.io/visualizing-neural-machine-translation-mechanics-of-seq2seq-models-with-attention/

https://jalammar.github.io/

https://newsletter.languagemodels.co/archive?sort=new

https://newsletter.languagemodels.co/p/the-illustrated-deepseek-r1
